name: Zzzz-Zzzz-Zzzz
short_description: When you sleep, you are dreaming. Some dreams are beautiful and vivid, the others are strange, and the rest of them are horrible... We've having them all the night, and then wake up and forget them. But what if one day your "awakening" would be a difficult task? Could you find a way out of the dreams and wake up?
detailed_description:
Steam Exclusive Offer

ATTENTION:
Steam version of the game has several significant differences from the freeware version. In this version of the game was made a lot of fixes, added some new extra levels and a lot of new gameplay features. By purchasing this version of the game, you will support the developer and it is allow us in the future to release new interesting projects!


About the Game

When you sleep, you are dreaming. Some dreams are beautiful and vivid, the others are strange, and the rest of them are horrible... We've having them all the night, and then wake up and forget them. But what if one day your "awakening" would be a difficult task? Could you find a way out of the dreams and wake up?

  • Non-linear storyline
  • Whole unique dream world to explore
  • Various game mechanics to solve puzzles
  • Unique mind-blow levels-dreams
